infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Kataku uses speech recognition to check what you said in the language you are learning.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Kataku uses the microphone to hear you speak your answers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kataku does not use your photo library; this notice is required by a system component the app links.

plugins.microphonePermission: Kataku records short clips of your answers so you can replay your progress.
